description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the nixos/nix Docker image and no services. Define a before_script that runs "nix-channel --add https://nixos.org/channels/nixpkgs-unstable" then "nix-channel --update". Add a build stage with a build job that executes "nix-shell --run make", stores the "public" directory as an artifact, and runs in the build stage. Add a deploy stage with a pages job that runs a no‑op ":" script, publishes the "public" directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, and only runs on the master branch.
